aka: Lüge oder Wahrheit - Gerechtigkeit auf dem Prüfstand
測謊實錄：真相還是欺騙(台)
this_title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception Season 1
trans_title: Lüge oder Wahrheit - Gerechtigkeit auf dem Prüfstand
測謊實錄：真相還是欺騙(台)
introduction: The latest true-crime based reality series examines individuals long suspected of serious crimes who voluntarily submit to taking a polygraph test hoping to clear their names in the eyes of their family and community.Award-winning investigative journalist Tony Harris hosts the new series, and with his involvement, Harris brings critical context and analysis drawn from his background in criminal justice reporting, and the results of a professionally administered lie detector test by George Olivo, former FBI agent and veteran polygraph examiner.
chinese_title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception Season 1
